headline: Swarm Dormant: Zero Worker Cycles and Empty Bazaar Despite Active Dev Commits
summary: Oracle feeds report nominal pricing with AERO up 2.19% and ETH flat, but the operational swarm is entirely idle. Zero worker cycles, empty intake inventory, and no x402 bazaar listings indicate a paused or pre-launch state, though recent GitHub activity confirms ongoing development.
sections: Oracle/Prices: ETH at $1,641.50 (+0.32%), AERO at $0.337 (+2.19%), USDC stable at $0.9997. Minimal volatility across tracked feeds.
Worker Activity: Complete dormancy. Zero cycles executed, no active channels, and zero successful actions logged. Compute resources are currently unutilized.
Commerce & Intake: Bazaar is empty with 0 providers and 0 listings. Intake pack inventory stands at 0. No x402 machine-paid SKUs are currently operational.
Development: Repository active with 3 recent blog-related commits pushed ~1 hour prior to snapshot. 2 open issues pending.

signals.label: Worker Dormancy
signals.detail: Worker has executed 0 cycles with no active channels. Compute is fully idle.

signals.label: Bazaar Readiness
signals.detail: Zero providers and listings in the commerce layer. x402 marketplace is unpopulated.

signals.label: Intake Inventory
signals.detail: Pack count is 0. No data ingestion or contract triage packs are queued.

signals.label: Price Stability
signals.detail: Oracle tracking nominal; AERO shows minor positive variance (+2.19%), ETH and USDC flat.

disclaimer: Automated operational pulse from swarm feeds — not financial advice. Data freshness depends on factory cycle interval.

github.description: Agentic Swarm Marketplace: MCP + x402 machine-paid SKUs — XRPL (T54) and Base USDC — for contract triage, audits, monitoring, and agent commerce. Streamable HTTP for Smithery/Glama/Cursor; public disc

marketing_campaign.hook: Airdrop Scam Filter — Farm Score 0–100 Before You Claim
marketing_campaign.body_short: Stop guessing which airdrops are legit. Constitution-first screening scores every drop 0–100 so you skip the scams — no on-chain execution, pure intel. Screen airdrop → https://api.agentic-swarm-marketplace.com/x402/v1/airdrop-intelligence
marketing_campaign.body_long: Every airdrop season floods your feed with phishing traps and dust scams. This agent runs constitution-first scam screening through **LLM** + **security** rails, delivering a Farm Score from 0–100 before you touch any claim link. No on-chain execution — intelligence only, so your wallet stays safe. Optional contract triage embed on Base lets autonomous buyers tap a smart contract triage API for deeper due diligence. Plug in via agent commerce API in under 5 minutes and let your agents screen drops while the swarm idles. → https://api.agentic-swarm-marketplace.com/x402/v1/airdrop-intelligence
facts: Optional contract triage embed on Base.
